creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The build in the port security/rpm-sequoia leaves the broken link security/rpm-sequoia/librpm_sequoia.so.1 after the build.

> cd /usr/ports/security/rpm-sequoia/work/target/release
> $ ls -l librpm_sequoia.so.1
> lrwxr-xr-x  1 yuri users 17 Dec 25 11:49 librpm_sequoia.so.1 -> librpm_sequoia.so
> $ ls -l librpm_sequoia.so
> ls: librpm_sequoia.so: No such file or directory
